sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32046" key="e)kqrombo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκθρομβ-όω</orth>, <sense id="n32046.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">clear fromclots,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σώματα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:2:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.2.10</biblScope> </bibl>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἕλκος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:60" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.60</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
